## 🚀 Features

- **AD forest auto-discovery**: After the first Windows AD server validates in the wizard, the app automatically probes the forest for additional domain controllers, DNS servers, and DHCP servers — including servers in child/sibling domains and standalone AD-authorised DHCP servers. New servers appear in a discovery panel with per-item **Add** and **Add All** buttons.

## 🔧 Enhancements

- **Best-effort discovery**: Partial forest probe failures are returned as warnings rather than hard errors — reachable servers are still returned even when some DCs are offline.
